title: The Pirates of Tarnoonga: A Droid Adventure
content:
{{Top|rwm|imp|italics=1}} {{Otheruses|The Pirates of Tarnoonga}} {{Book |image=[[File:Piratesoftarnoonga.jpg]] |title=''The Pirates of Tarnoonga:
A Droid Adventure'' |author=[[Ellen Weiss]] |cover artist=[[Carter Concepts, Inc.]] |illustrator= |editor= |publisher=[[Random House]] |early release= |release date=[[1986]]{{BanthaCite|31|Ewoks & Droids: Read All About 'Em}} |intl release= |rereleased= |media type=Hardcover |pages=29 |isbn=9780394879260 |isbn2= |isbn3= |timeline=[[15 BBY/Legends|15 BBY]]{{InsiderCite|73|A State of Nelvana: Droids & Ewoks Adventure Hour Revisited|A State of Nelvana: ''Droids & Ewoks Adventure Hour'' Revisited}}{{PolyhedronCite|170|Star Wars Droids: The Adventures of R2-D2 and C-3PO}}{{SW|url=news/from-boonta-to-baobab-droids-and-the-star-wars-prequels|text=From Boonta to Baobab: ''Droids'' and the ''Star Wars'' Prequels|nolive=1}} |series=''[[Star Wars: Droids: The Adventures of R2-D2 and C-3PO]]'' |preceded by=''[[The White Witch: A Droid Adventure]]'' |followed by=''[[Escape from the Monster Ship: A Droid Adventure]]'' }} '''''The Pirates of Tarnoonga: A Droid Adventure''''' is a [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] children's book adaptation of the [[Star Wars: Droids: The Adventures of R2-D2 and C-3PO|''Star Wars Droids'']] episode "[[The Pirates of Tarnoonga]]." It was written by [[Ellen Weiss]], illustrated by [[Carter Concepts, Inc.]], and published in [[1986]] by [[Random House]]. ==Publisher's summary== ''R2-D2 and C-3PO match wits with the evil space pirate Kybo Ren as they rush to the aid of their new friend, King Julpa, whose planet is being threatened by the pirates'' ==Plot summary== {{Plot-link|Star Wars: Droids: The Adventures of R2-D2 and C-3PO}} ==Continuity== ''The Pirates of Tarnoonga'' is an adaptation of the [[Star Wars: Droids: The Adventures of R2-D2 and C-3PO|''Star Wars: Droids'']] episode of the [[The Pirates of Tarnoonga|same name]], which was written by [[Peter Sauder]]. ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from The Pirates of Tarnoonga: A Droid Adventure}} ===Editions=== *{{ISBN|9780394879260}};
